overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character exploring the ancient waterfront of Alexandria. The character transitions from crouching to walking along a sunlit stone dock lined with historic buildings, wooden cranes, and market stalls.

events.description: character stands up from crouching position and begins walking forward

agents.ego_description: crouching and working on the ground with tools and materials, then stands up and begins walking along the waterfront

notable_agents.action: standing and observing the player character
walking away from camera toward the docks

entered.detail: ancient white and red stone structure with wooden door and small windows
wooden planks and posts extending over the water
large red ceramic vessels and woven baskets
tall wooden construction crane used for loading ships

segments.scene_description: The scene opens with the character crouched on a stone waterfront path, working with tools near large red pottery vessels. Ancient stone buildings line the left side while wooden docks extend over the water to the right. The character stands up and begins walking toward a large wooden crane visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient harbor dock with loading crane

events.description: passing under a fabric canopy into the industrial dock area with wooden structures
large wooden crane structure temporarily blocks the view of the water

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone waterfront path toward the large wooden crane

notable_agents.action: seated craftsman working on materials by the dockside
walking toward camera along the waterfront path

entered.detail: fabric sun shade supported by wooden poles over the walkway
ancient wooden vessel docked at the harbor edge
large stone blocks forming the harbor wall along the water

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the open waterfront promenade, passing under a fabric canopy and approaching a massive wooden loading crane. A seated craftsman works on the left while another pedestrian approaches from ahead. Wooden boats are moored along the stone quay to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient dockside market with fabric merchants

events.description: entering the covered market area with hanging fabrics and textile stalls
ground surface becomes covered with colorful fabrics and market textiles

agents.ego_description: walking through the bustling dockside market area with textile stalls and fabric vendors

notable_agents.action: seated vendor arranging goods and textiles on the ground
walking through the market carrying goods

entered.detail: large wooden market structure with hanging red and orange textiles
piles of wooden planks and construction materials
tall palm trees visible on the horizon beyond the buildings

segments.scene_description: The character enters a bustling market area shaded by fabric canopies, where colorful textiles are laid out on the stone ground. Vendors and shoppers populate the dockside, with stacks of lumber and construction materials visible to the right. The large crane now recedes into the background as palm trees mark the distant horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunlit ancient waterfront that transitions from a quiet workspace into a bustling dockside market. It begins with the character crouched beside large red pottery vessels on a stone path, standing up to walk toward a massive wooden crane in the distance. As the character advances along the open promenade, the scene opens up to reveal moored wooden boats on the right and a seated craftsman on the left. The path then shifts into a shaded market area where the camera passes under fabric canopies and over colorful textiles spread across the ground. Finally, the environment becomes crowded with vendors and shoppers amidst stacks of lumber, while the large crane recedes into the background toward a horizon lined with palm trees.
